Operation 'get_child' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, unclear_purpose, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing summary entirely. Description is vague about what 'child' means in this context and doesn't clarify input/output formats. Added context about hierarchical relationships and clarified that it returns a list of UUIDs to improve AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Get child UUID(s) from a specified project or publisher UUID.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve child UUIDs for a resource
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all child UUIDs associated with a specified parent resource (project or publisher). Accepts a parent UUID as input and returns a list of child UUIDs registered in the CyCAT catalogue. Useful for exploring hierarchical relationships within the cybersecurity resource catalogue.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description is vague about what 'child' means in this context and doesn't clarify input/output formats. Added context about hierarchical relationships and clarified that it returns a list of UUIDs to improve AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'get_generate_uuid' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, missing_output_details. Missing summary. data.description_suggestion: Generates a new UUID version 4 that is RFC4122-compliant. This operation requires no input parameters and returns a randomly generated UUID suitable for use as a unique identifier in CyCAT resource registration. Useful for creating new resource entries in the catalogue.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks context about what the generated UUID is used for and doesn't specify output format. Added information about no required inputs, output format, and use case within CyCAT context for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'get_list_project' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, missing_output_details. Missing summary. Description mentions pagination but doesn't clarify what data is returned or the format of start/end parameters. Added context about what constitutes a 'project' in CyCAT, expected return values, and use cases for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: List projects registered in CyCAT by pagination (start,end).
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all projects registered in the CyCAT cybersecurity resource catalogue. Accepts start and end parameters to define the pagination range. Returns project metadata including project UUIDs, names, and descriptions. Useful for browsing or discovering available cybersecurity projects in the catalogue.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description mentions pagination but doesn't clarify what data is returned or the format of start/end parameters. Added context about what constitutes a 'project' in CyCAT, expected return values, and use cases for AI agent decision-making.
